\tzpentry{ID3485}{Mode Frequency Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3485 introduces Mode Frequency Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \frac{D\boldsymbol{\omega}}{Dt} = (\boldsymbol{\omega}\cdot\nabla)\mathbf{u} + \nu\nabla^2\boldsymbol{\omega} + \nabla\times\left(\frac{\mathbf{f}_\text{mag}}{\rho}\right). \]
